tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Used To.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Used To का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I used to go to school daily. He used to smoke. We used to live in a village. She used to play cricket. They used to study together.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Used To.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Used To का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I used to sleep early. Did you use to live here? He used to be very shy. I used to listen to this song a lot. They used to meet every week.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "मैं पहले फुटबॉल खेलता था।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "She use to play cricket."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Used To.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Used To का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: We used to go by bus. I did not use to do this. He used to wake up early. I used to study a lot.
